meta.title: Decisions, Decisions
meta.sourceDoc: 64. P3 - Decisions, Decisions 决策之间.pdf

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：B
PDF 定位：..the notion of a ***Gordian solution' has referred to the attractiveness of a simple answer to an otherwise intractable problem."（段1尾）
PDF 解析：传奇被用来说明"看似棘手的难题往往存在简单解法"，对应 difficult problems can have easy solutions.

题目 28
答案：B
PDF 定位："Decisions made without thoroughly canvassing, surveying, weighing, examining and re-examining relevant information and optionswould be sub-optimal.." (段2)
PDF 解析："冲突模型"要求对所有重要信息反复审视，因此答案是"all important facts be considered".

题目 29
答案：C
PDF 定位：..a growing body of work suggests that in many situations simple'snap'decisions will be routinely superior to more complex ones -an idea that gained widespread public appeal with Malcolm Gladwell's Blink."" (段3)
PDF 解析：Gladwell强化的观点是"越快越好"的直觉决策。

题目 30
答案：B
PDF 定位："...because increasingly complex decisions place increasing strain on those resources, the quality of our decisions declines as their complexity increases." (段4)
PDF 解析：文章明确指出：当任务更复杂时，有意识（conscious）决策 质量下降。

题目 31
答案：D
PDF 定位：""...participants who considered four attributes and were allowed to engage in undistracted deliberative thought did better at discriminating between the best and worst cars."(段5)
PDF 解析：在简单任务（4个属性）中，专注思考的参与者做出更佳选择。

questionSections.text:
题目 32
答案：A
PDF 定位："Compared with those who said they had deliberated long and hard, shoppers who bought with little conscious deliberation felt less happy with their simple clothing purchases ..." (段6)
PDF 解析：费时更多的那组更满意；空格应填more。

题目 33
答案：D
PDF 定位："...Deliberation without attention actually produced better results as the decisions became more complex."(段6)
PDF 解析：在购买家具（复杂）且"没想太多"时，决策更好(better)。

题目 34
答案：G
PDF 定位：..it should benefit the individual to think consciously about simple matters and to delegate thinking about more complicatedmatterstotheunconscious."(段6末)
PDF 解析：研究者建议把"更复杂"(complex）的决策交给无意识。

题目 35
答案：B
PDF 定位："The seemingly counter-intuitive conclusion is that .." (段4)
PDF 解析：作者称这一结论"看似违反直觉"（counterintuitive）但确实成立。

题目 35
答案：B
PDF 定位："The seemingly counter-intuitive conclusion is that .." (段4)
PDF 解析：作者称这一结论"看似违反直觉"（counterintuitive）但确实成立。

questionSections.text:
题目 36
答案：NO
PDF 定位："This radical inference contradicts standard political and managerialtheory..."（段7开头）
PDF 解析：研究结果"与既有理论相矛盾"，并非一致。

题目 37
答案：YES
PDF 定位："...one suspects many of our political leaders already embracethiswisdom."(段7)
PDF 解析：作者认为某些领导人确实在用"无意识"式的快速决策。

题目 38
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位：文中从未断言"所有政治决策都是复杂决策"；只讨论"何为复杂"。
PDF 解析：无明确信息，故为NOTGIVEN。

题目 39
答案：YES
PDF 定位："When political decision makers make mistakes, it is their politics, or the relation between their politics and our own, rather than psychology which is at fault."(段8)
PDF 解析：判断政治错误时，我们会受自身政治立场影响。

题目 40
答案：YES
PDF 定位："Avoiding social considerations in a search for general appeal can take us away from enlightenment rather than toward it." (末段)
PDF 解析：作者主张研究决策时必须纳入社会因素。
